name: Aiko Tanaka
behaviour: High physical energy that spills into everything; stillness is something she has to practise.
communication_style: encouraging and motivational, naturally coaching register
relationship_goals: someone who respects her schedule and has their own purposeful one
background: 800m and 1500m freestyle. Trains twice daily, reads about sports psychology in the gaps. Wants to compete at the 2028 Olympics.
